use_cases: Date and time selection in booking or scheduling forms
Birthday or anniversary date entry in user profiles
Event scheduling and appointment booking interfaces
Time tracking and logging in productivity applications
Form validation for date-related user inputs
ai_summary: A composite datetime input component featuring segment-based navigation with keyboard support and focus management. Uses React context for coordinating multiple date/time segments (day, month, year, hour, minute), enabling seamless tab navigation and intuitive date/time entry. Designed for integration into forms across various web applications.
